applied_suggestions.note: Phenotype now has 1 inhibitor (TFL1) per §9.9 repressing-arm requirement.
TFL1 now has 4 outgoing edges (AP1, LFY, SOC1, FD) plus the phenotype inhibition — Motif 5 Multi-Output Scaffold complete.
DELLA Multi-Output Scaffold extended to 5 targets: SPL9, LFY, SOC1, CO, PIF4. Enables GA–photoperiod and GA–thermosensing crosstalk.
GA2OX (source GENE) completes Motif 4 Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance for Gibberellin (1 activator GA20OX + 1 inhibitor GA2OX).

SVP now has 4 inhibitors (Warm, FCA, FVE, SOC1) and one activating output to FLC. SOC1<->SVP mutual inhibition is Motif 7. Pre-Edge check 4 (feedback): SVP->FLC->SOC1-|SVP closes a positive self-loop on SVP but it coincides with existing SVP-|SOC1 direct inhibition — this is coherent feed-forward on SOC1 from SVP. Damping=0.7 handles bistable behaviour per Motif 7 note.

FT activator count rises to 6 (CO, FKF1, GI, PIF4, Warm_Temperature + T6P from S010); inhibitors rise to 3 (FLC, SVP, CDF1). FT coverage ratio 0.19 -> ~0.36. These form Motif 3 Coherent Feed-Forward with existing CO-path.

applied_suggestions.reason: Hard-cap violation of BUILDER §10 (max 7 inhibitors per node). FLC already has 7 inhibitors (VIN3, PRC2, FCA, FPA, FLD, FVE, LD); adding Vernalization->FLC (E308) would make 8. The vernalization effect on FLC is already captured via Cold/Vernalization -> VIN3 -> FLC (E067, E310, E298) with VIN3 recruiting PRC2 (E300, implicit in PRC2 source). Dropping an autonomous-pathway gene to make room would lose single-mutant resolution (fca, fve, fld, ld are distinct perturbations). Reassess in iteration 3 if Judge provides an alternative restructure.

applied_suggestions.note: Closes Motif 7 mutual inhibition SOC1<->AP2. Safe bistable switch with damping.

FUL integrator added with 2 activators (FT, SPL9) and 2 outputs (AP1, Flowering_Time). Phenotype activator count 3 -> 4, still within §10 (3-5 max). FT -> FUL -> AP1 and FT -> AP1 form Motif 3 Coherent Feed-Forward.
Sugar-sensing arm added. Sucrose now has 2 outgoing edges (miR156, T6P). TPS1 source GENE, T6P non-source METABOLITE. Provides tps1-mutant phenotype prediction capability.

applied_suggestions.reason: VRN1's only curated edge is VRN1 -> FLC (E304). FLC inhibitor count is at the §10 hard cap of 7; adding VRN1 -> FLC would push FLC to 8 inhibitors. Without a connecting edge VRN1 would be a floating node (violates BUILDER §1.1 Rule 1). VRN1's biological role (vernalization-induced FLC repression) is already covered by the VIN3/PRC2 cascade — the reason S007 was also rejected.

applied_suggestions.note: Thermomorphogenesis negative feedback on PIF4. PIF4 now has 1 activator (Warm_Temperature), 2 inhibitors (DELLA from S003, GI from S012). Safe single-negative feedback (not mutual positive).

edges_rejected.reason: Perception-Gate purity rule (BUILDER §12 Motif 1). Gibberellin must have a single outgoing edge to GID1; GA effect on AGL24 would need to flow through DELLA. No curated DELLA -> AGL24 edge exists, so the GA effect on AGL24 cannot be modelled without breaking gate purity. Flag as literature_gap.

applied_suggestions.note: AGL24 now has 2 activators (SOC1, Vernalization). Gibberellin retains single-outgoing-edge discipline.

applied_suggestions.reason: Phenotype already has TFL1 inhibitor from S001; FLC influence on the phenotype already flows through FT and SOC1 (dual cascade paths). Adding FLC -> Flowering_Time direct would be redundant with the cascade philosophy in BUILDER §11. LOW priority - not blocking.
Superseded by S010: the T6P intermediate node now carries the sugar -> FT signal, which is mechanistically preferable (Wahl 2013 shows T6P as the proximate FT activator, not sucrose directly).

AP2 -> AP1 edge (E017 MEDIUM) kept. AP2 -| SOC1 -> AP1 provides the main age-pathway influence on AP1; AP2 -> AP1 direct adds orthogonal repression. Mechanism string is pulled from curated. No urgent change; can revisit in iteration 3 if Judge flags.
